_comment: DANIEL — replace this with your exact ClickUp layout. The replicator creates a new Folder under CLICKUP_SPACE_ID, named after the incoming client, then creates each list below inside that folder, then creates each task inside the matching list. Statuses, custom fields, automations, and views are NOT copied via API — set those on a ClickUp Folder Template inside ClickUp itself and (optionally) reference its template_id below to have ClickUp apply it after creation.

lists.name: Onboarding
lists.content: Kickoff checklist for the new client

tasks.name: Collect access credentials
tasks.description: CRM, accounting, ad accounts, phone system.
